turtledemo.two_canvases
Use TurtleScreen and RawTurtle to draw on two
distinct canvases in a separate window. The
new window must be separately closed in
addition to pressing the STOP button.
TurtleScreen
	RawTurtle
#ddffff)
widthZ
heightZ
#ffeeee
333333
red)
blue)
turtle
Z	EVENTLOOP)
CanvasZ
packr
bgcolorr
colorr
shape
begin_fill
range
end_fillZ
bk)	
rootZ
cv1Z

main
__main__N)

__name__Z
mainloopr
